title: CVE-2026-57827: Joomla RSFiles RCE
summary: [P1] Joomla extension RSFiles is vulnerable to an unauthenticated arbitrary file execution, with no patch available. This vulnerability can be exploited to gain remote code execution on affected systems. Why now: Lack of patch and potential for exploitation in the wild. (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for remote code execution, which is a classic example of an RCE problem type.

title: CVE-2026-56240: Capgo Billing Auth Bypass
